meaning: vt.劝诱,促使,导致,引起,感应
examples: Nothing would induce me to take the job.
Whales being sociable animals probably need the stimulus of sizeable gatherings to induce reproductives behavior.
"I don't think management courses should start trying to induce guilt in others, " says Schaumberg.
This past August Microsoft began using security to induce more customers to opt for Software Assurance.
